original_title: XVSR-091 Provocative Maid Momoka Ogawa Momoka
overview: Momoka, a housekeeper who carelessly makes her beloved "husband" paralyzed and makes her sad. The son who was lustful for the appearance of apologizing and serving earnestly approaches Momoka who can not refuse and forcibly forms a physical relationship. Momoka wakes up as a'woman'in a sneaky act. Momoka, who fell into a lust trap, is betrayed by her son when she sees her son indulging in masturbation because she can't stop her aching body and her love for her husband. Eventually everything will be revealed ... A sensual drama produced by Momoka Ogawa!
